context: By 2005, Russia had a more structured music industry with radio airplay charts (TopHit) and talent shows like Fabrika Zvyozd producing new pop acts. The scene was dominated by polished pop (VIA Gra, Dima Bilan, Glukoza), pop-rock (Zveri), and the lingering influence of t.A.T.u.'s international breakthrough.

tracks.title: Ty Dolzhna Ryadom Byt (You Should Be Near)
